title: Build the Superteam Brazil Learning Management System dApp

audit.reason: The smart contract implementation is incomplete and lacks important functions such as withdrawing funds, checking course enrollment status, and handling refunds. Additionally, the front-end development, payment processing integration, testing strategies, and deployment strategies are not described or implemented.
audit.improvements: Complete the smart contract implementation by adding functions for withdrawing funds, checking course enrollment status, handling refunds, and any other necessary functionality. Provide a detailed description and implementation of the front-end development using React.js, payment processing integration with Stripe, testing strategies, and deployment strategies.
